ValidationRule.description: Service Competitor is required when stage is Closed Lost and Closed Reasons is 'Using 3rd party service provider/in-house'
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = "ServiceContract", ISPICKVAL(StageName , "Closed Lost"), ISPICKVAL(Closed_Reason__c , "Using 3rd party service provider/in-house"), ISBLANK(TEXT(Service_Competitor__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Service Competitor is required when stage is Closed Lost and Closed Reasons is 'Using 3rd party service provider/in-house'.
